sizing_rule.note: Reduce position size by exponential decay based on cumulative trading days in market regime. Position size multiplier = 0.5^(trading_days/120) with 50% minimum floor. Reassess monthly. Rationale: longer exposure increases probability of catastrophic shocks independent of per-trade risk limits.

source_rule_text: A trader should reduce position size or exposure when cumulative trading time increases, because longer market exposure compounds the probability of experiencing catastrophic price shocks regardless of per-trade risk management.
